title: Multi-provider OCR expansion (GH #121 + #92)
description:
Epic: Multi-Provider OCR — expand beyond OpenAI

## GH Issues
- Claude batch mapping: https://github.com/civictechdc/votecatcher/issues/121
- Agentic workflow: https://github.com/civictechdc/votecatcher/issues/92

## Goal
Add Anthropic Claude as OCR provider alongside OpenAI. Evaluate agentic framework for region-adaptive OCR pipeline.

## Execution Order
1. Map Claude batch status → MatchingStatus (concrete, testable)
2. Agentic workflow spike (exploratory, depends on #1 + multi-provider patterns)
